name: Cordial (Actions)
description: Sync Segment Users, Groups and Events to Cordial

endpoint.description: Cordial API endpoint. Leave default, unless you've been provided with another one. [See more details](https://support.cordial.com/hc/en-us/sections/200553578-REST-API-Introduction-and-Overview)
endpoint.label: Endpoint

segmentIdKey.description: Cordial string unique attribute key to store Segment User ID in (e.g. `segment_id`)
segmentIdKey.label: User ID attribute key

actions.name: Add Contact to List
actions.description: Add contact to a list. If the list does not exist in Cordial it will be created.

fields.label: User Identities
fields.description: An ordered list of contact identifiers in Cordial. Each item in the list represents an identifier. For example, `channels.email.address -> userId` and/or `customerId -> traits.customerId`. If a contact is found using the identifiers it is updated, otherwise a new contact is created.

userIdentities.title: User Identities
userIdentities.description: An ordered list of contact identifiers in Cordial. Each item in the list represents an identifier. For example, `channels.email.address -> userId` and/or `customerId -> traits.customerId`. If a contact is found using the identifiers it is updated, otherwise a new contact is created.

fields.label: List name
fields.description: Cordial list name. Optional. If list name is empty, the name of the list will be set to segment_[groupId].

listName.title: List name
listName.description: Cordial list name. Optional. If list name is empty, the name of the list will be set to segment_[groupId].

actions.name: Add Product to Cart
actions.description: Add product to Cordial contact cart

For example, `channels.email.address -> userId` and/or `customerId -> traits.customerId`. If a contact is found using the identifiers it is updated, otherwise a new contact is created.

For example, `channels.email.address -> userId` and/or `customerId -> traits.customerId`. If a contact is found using the identifiers it is updated, otherwise a new contact is created.

fields.label: Properties
fields.description: Properties of a product (e.g brand, color, size)

properties.title: Properties
properties.description: Properties of a product (e.g brand, color, size)

fields.description: An ordered list of contact identifiers in Cordial. Each item in the list represents an identifier. For example, `channels.email.address -> userId` and/or `customerId -> traits.customerId`. If a contact is found using the identifiers it is updated, otherwise a new contact is created.

userIdentities.title: User Identities
userIdentities.description: An ordered list of contact identifiers in Cordial. Each item in the list represents an identifier. For example, `channels.email.address -> userId` and/or `customerId -> traits.customerId`. If a contact is found using the identifiers it is updated, otherwise a new contact is created.

fields.label: Event timestamp
fields.description: Event timestamp. Optional. Date format is ISO 8601 standard. If empty, the request upload time will be used.

time.title: Event timestamp
time.description: Event timestamp. Optional. Date format is ISO 8601 standard. If empty, the request upload time will be used.

fields.label: Event properties
fields.description: An object of additional event attributes. Optional.

properties.title: Event properties
properties.description: An object of additional event attributes. Optional.

fields.label: Event context
fields.description: Event context as it appears in Segment. Optional. We use context to capture event metadata like sender ip and device info.

context.title: Event context
context.description: Event context as it appears in Segment. Optional. We use context to capture event metadata like sender ip and device info.

fields.label: Previous Segment ID
fields.description: Previous Segment User or Anonymous ID value

previousId.title: Previous Segment ID
previousId.description: Previous Segment User or Anonymous ID value

actions.description: Removes product from Cordial contact cart

actions.name: Upsert Contact
actions.description: Create or update a contact in Cordial.

fields.label: User Identities
fields.description: An ordered list of contact identifiers in Cordial. Each item in the list represents an identifier. For example, `channels.email.address -> userId` and/or `customerId -> traits.customerId`. If a contact is found using the identifiers it is updated, otherwise a new contact is created.

userIdentities.title: User Identities
userIdentities.description: An ordered list of contact identifiers in Cordial. Each item in the list represents an identifier. For example, `channels.email.address -> userId` and/or `customerId -> traits.customerId`. If a contact is found using the identifiers it is updated, otherwise a new contact is created.

fields.label: Contact Attributes
fields.description: Contact attributes to update. Optional. Contact attributes must exist in Cordial prior to updating. Attributes that do not exist in Cordial will be ignored. Complex attribute types to be mapped via dot notation, for example, `cordialPerson.first_name -> traits.segmentPerson.firstName`, `cordialPerson.last_name -> traits.segmentPerson.lastName`. Segment trait address can be mapped directly to geo Cordial attribute: `geo_cordial_attribute -> traits.address`.

attributes.title: Contact Attributes
attributes.description: Contact attributes to update. Optional. Contact attributes must exist in Cordial prior to updating. Attributes that do not exist in Cordial will be ignored. Complex attribute types to be mapped via dot notation, for example, `cordialPerson.first_name -> traits.segmentPerson.firstName`, `cordialPerson.last_name -> traits.segmentPerson.lastName`. Segment trait address can be mapped directly to geo Cordial attribute: `geo_cordial_attribute -> traits.address`.

actions.name: Upsert Order
actions.defaultTrigger: event = "Order Completed" or event = "Order Updated" or event = "Order Refunded" or event = "Order Cancelled"

fields.label: User Identities
fields.description: An ordered list of contact identifiers in Cordial. Each item in the list represents an identifier. For example, `channels.email.address -> userId` and/or `customerId -> traits.customerId`. If a contact is found using the identifiers it is updated, otherwise a new contact is created.

userIdentities.title: User Identities
userIdentities.description: An ordered list of contact identifiers in Cordial. Each item in the list represents an identifier. For example, `channels.email.address -> userId` and/or `customerId -> traits.customerId`. If a contact is found using the identifiers it is updated, otherwise a new contact is created.

fields.label: Discount application
fields.description: Discount application data, allowed fields: type (only 'fixed' as of now), amount (float discount amount, e.g. 10.45)

discountApplication.title: Discount application
discountApplication.description: Discount application data, allowed fields: type (only 'fixed' as of now), amount (float discount amount, e.g. 10.45)

type.title: Type
type.description: Type of discount applied to the order (e.g. fixed)

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Amount of the discount applied to the order

manufacturerName.title: Manufacturer name
manufacturerName.description: Manufacturer name of the purchased item.

imageUrl.title: Image URL
imageUrl.description: Image URL of the purchased item.

properties.title: Properties
properties.description: Additional properties of the purchased item.
